name: DevSecOps Pipeline
title: SECURITY-FIRST CI/CD DEMO
description: A production-ready DevSecOps pipeline integrating 5 security tools across every stage of the CI/CD lifecycle — from secret detection to dynamic runtime attack simulation.

Built on GitHub Actions, each push to main triggers: Gitleaks (secret scanning), SonarCloud (SAST), Snyk (SCA), Trivy (container image scanning), and OWASP ZAP (DAST) — all gates must pass before deployment.
The Flask application enforces 5 HTTP security headers, runs as a hardened non-root container, and generates a consolidated security report as a pipeline artifact on every commit.

en.title: DevSecOps Pipeline
en.description: GitHub Actions workflow integrating 5 security gates across the full delivery lifecycle of a Flask application — secret scanning, unit tests, SAST, SCA, container build, container scan, and DAST running in parallel where possible.
highlights: Shift-left: secrets blocked before code is compiled
SAST + SCA in parallel — SonarCloud and Snyk
DAST found 5 missing security headers → all fixed
Single image build verified by both Trivy and ZAP

en.title: KuberLab — AWS Kubernetes Lab
en.description: Production-realistic Kubernetes platform on AWS provisioned with Terraform. GitOps-driven application delivery via ArgoCD. Zero public IPs — all access through Tailscale VPN. Designed to be torn down and rebuilt repeatedly.
highlights: App of Apps pattern for GitOps at scale
No public IP on EC2 — Tailscale-only access
Dynamic AMI lookup — no hardcoded IDs

es.title: Pipeline DevSecOps
es.description: Workflow de GitHub Actions que integra 5 controles de seguridad a lo largo del ciclo de vida completo de una aplicación Flask — escaneo de secretos, pruebas unitarias, SAST, SCA, build del contenedor, escaneo del contenedor y DAST en paralelo donde es posible.
highlights: Shift-left: secretos bloqueados antes de compilar
SAST + SCA en paralelo — SonarCloud y Snyk
DAST encontró 5 cabeceras de seguridad ausentes → todas corregidas
Una sola build de imagen verificada por Trivy y ZAP

es.title: KuberLab — Laboratorio Kubernetes en AWS
es.description: Plataforma Kubernetes realista en AWS provisionada con Terraform. Entrega de aplicaciones mediante GitOps con ArgoCD. Sin IPs públicas — todo el acceso a través de Tailscale VPN. Diseñado para ser destruido y reconstruido repetidamente.
highlights: Despliegue Terraform en dos fases (red → plataforma)
Patrón App of Apps para GitOps a escala
Sin IP pública en EC2 — acceso solo por Tailscale
Búsqueda dinámica de AMI — sin IDs hardcodeados

experiences.title: DevSecOps Engineer
experiences.subtitle: Merabytes
description: > Development and implementation of a SaaS platform for automating internal and external security audits, integrating reconnaissance, anomalous behavior detection and AI-powered report generation.
- Development and maintenance of cloud environments using Terraform, automating resource provisioning and ensuring consistency across environments.
- Implementation of CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions integrating SAST (SonarQube), SCA (Snyk) and DAST (OWASP ZAP), ensuring no code with critical vulnerabilities reaches production.
- Containerization and hardening of Docker images, reducing the attack surface and final image size through Multi-stage builds.
- Secrets management with Azure Key Vault and AWS IAM, enforcing access policies and least privilege principle across pipelines and cloud environments.
- Development of Bash, Python and PowerShell scripts to automate administration, monitoring and deployment tasks across cloud and on-premise environments.
- Contributed to ENS High and ISO 27001 compliance by implementing key technical controls: least privilege access management, corporate VPN (Zero Trust) and a security maturity roadmap.
- Stack: Terraform, GitHub Actions, SonarQube, Snyk, OWASP ZAP, Docker, Azure Key Vault, AWS IAM, Kubernetes
description_es: > En Merabytes diseñé la infraestructura de seguridad de una plataforma SaaS desde cero. Con bagaje de pentester, sabía exactamente qué controles importaban y por qué.
- Cloud & Infra: Terraform, Kubernetes, ArgoCD, Docker
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions, SonarQube (SAST), Snyk (SCA), OWASP ZAP (DAST)
- Compliance: ENS Alta, ISO 27001, Azure Key Vault, AWS IAM

experiences.title: Pentester
experiences.subtitle: BMM Testlabs
description: > Execution of penetration tests (black-box, grey-box, and white-box) on web applications, mobile apps, and systems, identifying exploitable vulnerabilities in real environments.
Identification and exploitation of vulnerabilities, developing proof-of-concepts (PoC) and documenting attack vectors to support remediation efforts.
Conducting security testing on Android, iOS, macOS, and Windows applications, using both static and dynamic analysis techniques.
Participation in technical audits and compliance projects, including PCI DSS (ASV), vulnerability validation, and remediation verification.
Preparation of detailed technical reports using OWASP methodologies and the MITRE ATT&CK framework, providing mitigation recommendations aligned with business objectives.
- Methodologies: OWASP, MITRE ATT&CK, PCI DSS (ASV)
description_es: > Dos años ejecutando ataques reales me enseñaron cómo piensa un atacante. Trabajé en el espectro completo en aplicaciones web, móviles y entornos de compliance.
- Plataformas: Web, iOS, Android, macOS, Windows
- Metodologías: OWASP, MITRE ATT&CK, PCI DSS (ASV)

experiences.title: Java Developer
experiences.subtitle: Everis (NTT DATA)
description: End-to-end development of web applications in Java and JSP, integrating SQL databases and web services to deliver scalable and maintainable solutions.
Implementation and consumption of APIs, workflow automation, and data-access optimization using MyBatis to improve application performance.
Collaboration with multidisciplinary teams in agile development environments to deliver high-quality solutions while meeting project deadlines and requirements.
- Stack: Java, JSP, SQL, MyBatis, REST APIs
description_es: > Mi punto de partida fue el desarrollo. Años después, como pentester, iba a explotar exactamente las decisiones técnicas que aquí tomábamos sin pensar en sus consecuencias de seguridad.
- Stack: Java, JSP, SQL, MyBatis, REST APIs

stages.title: Secret Scanning
stages.subtitle: Gitleaks
description: The pipeline's first gate scans the entire repository history for hard-coded secrets before any code is built or tested.
- Tool: Gitleaks
- Scope: Full git history, all file types
Blocks the pipeline immediately if any API key, token, or password is detected — preventing credentials from ever reaching a built artifact.

stages.title: Unit Testing
stages.subtitle: Pytest + Flask Test Client
description: Runs the full test suite to verify functional correctness before any security tool is invoked.
- Framework: Pytest 8.2.0
- Coverage: / and /health endpoints, HTTP status codes, JSON response shape
Tests must pass before SAST and SCA run — no point scanning broken code.

stages.title: Static Analysis (SAST)
stages.subtitle: SonarCloud
description: Static Application Security Testing analyses the source code for security vulnerabilities, code smells, and quality issues without executing it.
- Tool: SonarCloud
- Finding: Missing explicit HTTP method declarations violated least-privilege principle
Runs in parallel with Snyk SCA for faster pipeline execution.

stages.title: Dependency Scanning (SCA)
stages.subtitle: Snyk
description: Software Composition Analysis scans all Python dependencies for known CVEs with a severity threshold.
- Tool: Snyk
- Finding: gunicorn 22.0.0 had a high-severity CVE — updated to 23.0.0
Runs in parallel with SonarCloud SAST after tests pass.

stages.title: Container Build
stages.subtitle: Docker + GitHub Container Registry
description: Builds a hardened multi-stage Docker image tagged with the commit SHA and pushes it to GHCR for immutable artifact tracking.
- Runtime: Python 3.12-slim (minimal OS attack surface)
- Security: Non-root appuser, multi-stage build, apt-get upgrade on base image
A single build guarantees Trivy and ZAP test the exact same image that reaches production — no rebuild risk.

stages.title: Container Image Scanning
stages.subtitle: Trivy
description: Scans the built Docker image at two layers: OS base packages and Python application dependencies.
- Tool: Trivy (Aqua Security)
- Threshold: CRITICAL and HIGH severity, ignore-unfixed: true
- Config: .trivyignore for accepted known risks
Only blocks on actionable vulnerabilities — CVEs with no available fix are not counted as blockers.

stages.title: Dynamic Testing (DAST)
stages.subtitle: OWASP ZAP
description: Dynamically attacks the running application to find runtime vulnerabilities that static analysis cannot detect.
- Tool: OWASP ZAP (Zed Attack Proxy)
- Finding: 5 missing HTTP security headers detected on first run
- Headers added: X-Content-Type-Options, Content-Security-Policy, Permissions-Policy, Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy, Cache-Control
- Config: .zap/rules.tsv for per-alert FAIL / WARN / IGNORE control
All 5 headers were added to the Flask app as a direct result of ZAP findings.

stages.title: Consolidated Report
stages.subtitle: Pipeline Artifact
description: A shell script aggregates outputs from all five security tools into a single downloadable artifact retained for 7 days.
- Inputs: Gitleaks JSON, SonarCloud analysis, Snyk SARIF, Trivy JSON, ZAP HTML report
- Output: GitHub Actions step summary + artifact bundle
Single-pane-of-glass view of the full security posture on every push to main.
